SEARCH
Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend

Class CustomerHomeUI

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.frontend.CustomerHomeUI
public class CustomerHomeUI extends Object
The main screen presented to a customer after a successful login. Organizes content into two tabs via a JTabbedPane: Movies — displays all available (unbooked) screenings in a searchable, sortable table with "View Details" and "Book Now" actions. My Bookings — displays the current user's booking history in a searchable, sortable table. On logout or window close, all session data is persisted to the respective CSV files via MovieCsvIO, CredentialCsvIO, and BookingCsvIO before returning to LoginUI.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    addBookingRow(Booking b)
    Adds the given Booking to currentBookingData and appends a corresponding row to the booking history table.
    static void
    initialize(String username, String email)
    Creates a new CustomerHomeUI instance, configures it with the given username and email, and makes the main window visible.
    static void
    removeMovie(String movieId)
    Removes the movie with the given ID from both currentMovieData and the movie table.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize(String username, String email)
      Creates a new CustomerHomeUI instance, configures it with the given username and email, and makes the main window visible. Both the movie list and booking history are loaded immediately on startup.
      Parameters:
      username - the display name of the logged-in customer, shown in the welcome label
      email - the email address of the logged-in customer, used for booking association

    • removeMovie

      public static void removeMovie(String movieId)
      Removes the movie with the given ID from both currentMovieData and the movie table. Called by CustomerBookingConfirmUI after a booking is confirmed, so the movie no longer appears as available.
      Parameters:
      movieId - the ID of the movie to remove from the table

    • addBookingRow

      public static void addBookingRow(Booking b)
      Adds the given Booking to currentBookingData and appends a corresponding row to the booking history table. Called by CustomerBookingConfirmUI immediately after a booking is confirmed.
      Parameters:
      b - the newly confirmed Booking to add to the history table
